languages.text: "Пожалуй, я могу рассказать вам об офицерах тридцать второго полка". {n}Себериан отмахивается легким жестом руки.{/n} "Но не сейчас. Вы свободны, капитан, я буду говорить с наследни{mf|ком|цей}".

"I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."
languages.original_text: "Пожалуй, я могу рассказать вам об офицерах тридцать второго полка". {n}Себериан отмахивается легким жестом руки.{/n} "Но не сейчас. Вы свободны, капитан, я буду говорить с наследни{mf|ком|цей}".

traits.locale_text: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

"I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

"I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

"I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

languages.text: "Ich denke, ich könnte Euch von den Offizieren des 32. Regiments erzählen." {n}Seberian wischt den Gedanken mit einer Geste seiner Hand weg.{/n} "Aber nicht jetzt. Ihr könnt abtreten, Captain. Ich werde mit {mf|dem Erben|der Erbin} sprechen."
languages.original_text: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke, ich könnte Euch von den Offizieren des 32. Regiments erzählen." {n}Seberian wischt den Gedanken mit einer Geste seiner Hand weg.{/n} "Aber nicht jetzt. Ihr könnt abtreten, Captain. Ich werde mit {mf|dem Erben|der Erbin} sprechen."

languages.text: « Je pourrais sans doute évoquer avec vous les officiers du 32e régiment. » {n}Seberian écarte aussitôt cette idée d'un vague geste de la main.{/n} « Mais plus tard. Vous pouvez disposer, capitaine. Je dois m'entretenir avec mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. »
languages.original_text: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: « Je pourrais sans doute évoquer avec vous les officiers du 32e régiment. » {n}Seberian écarte aussitôt cette idée d'un vague geste de la main.{/n} « Mais plus tard. Vous pouvez disposer, capitaine. Je dois m'entretenir avec mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. »

languages.text: «Supongo que podría hablarle de los oficiales del 32.º regimiento». {n}Seberian descarta la idea con un ademán.{/n} «Pero no es el momento. Puede retirarse, capitana. Hablaré con mi hereder{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: «Supongo que podría hablarle de los oficiales del 32.º regimiento». {n}Seberian descarta la idea con un ademán.{/n} «Pero no es el momento. Puede retirarse, capitana. Hablaré con mi hereder{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: "Sanırım 32. Alay'ın subaylarından bahsedebilirim." {n}Seberian, elinin hafif bir hareketiyle bu düşünceyi reddediyor.{/n} "Fakat şimdi olmaz. Sen gidebilirsin. Vârisimle konuşacağım."
languages.original_text: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: "Sanırım 32. Alay'ın subaylarından bahsedebilirim." {n}Seberian, elinin hafif bir hareketiyle bu düşünceyi reddediyor.{/n} "Fakat şimdi olmaz. Sen gidebilirsin. Vârisimle konuşacağım."

languages.text: “我倒是可以跟你讲讲第32团的军官们。”{n}塞贝里安轻轻一挥手，打消了这个念头。{/n}“但不是现在。你可以退下了，上尉。我跟继承人还有话要说。”
languages.original_text: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: “我倒是可以跟你讲讲第32团的军官们。”{n}塞贝里安轻轻一挥手，打消了这个念头。{/n}“但不是现在。你可以退下了，上尉。我跟继承人还有话要说。”

languages.text: 「第三十二連隊の将校たちについてなら、話してやれよう。」{n}セベリアンは軽く手を振って、その考えを退ける。{/n}「だが、今ではない。下がってよいぞ、隊長。私は後継者と話す。」
languages.original_text: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."

traits.locale_text: 「第三十二連隊の将校たちについてなら、話してやれよう。」{n}セベリアンは軽く手を振って、その考えを退ける。{/n}「だが、今ではない。下がってよいぞ、隊長。私は後継者と話す。」
